name: Tesamorelin
subtitle: GHRH Analog | Visceral Fat Reduction

modifications: Modified with trans-3-hexenoic acid at N-terminus for enhanced stability

overview: Tesamorelin is an FDA-approved synthetic GHRH analog designed for HIV-associated lipodystrophy treatment. It provides selective visceral fat targeting with 15-20% visceral fat reduction in clinical trials while preserving subcutaneous fat.
mechanism: Subcutaneous injection provides optimal bioavailability for GHRH receptor binding and pulsatile GH release stimulation, selectively targeting visceral adipose tissue while sparing subcutaneous fat.

items.name: HIV-Associated Lipodystrophy
items.description: FDA-approved indication showing 15-20% visceral fat reduction in clinical trials.

items.name: Selective Visceral Fat Targeting
items.description: Unique mechanism that reduces dangerous visceral fat while sparing subcutaneous fat.

items.name: Sustained Fat Loss
items.description: Maintained weight loss with continuous treatment over 52+ weeks in clinical studies.

items.name: Lean Mass Preservation
items.description: Preserves lean muscle mass during fat loss.

deliveryMethods.overview: Subcutaneous injection to abdomen (avoid navel ±2 inches). Evening injection preferred for GH circadian rhythm alignment.

materials: Sterile water (Egrifta SV) or Bacteriostatic water (Egrifta WR)
steps: Allow vial to reach room temperature
Egrifta SV: Add 0.5mL sterile water to 2mg vial - use immediately
Egrifta WR: Add 1.3mL bacteriostatic water to 11.6mg vial - stable 7 days
Store reconstituted WR at room temperature up to 7 days

interactions.notes: Synergistic GH stimulation; monitor IGF-1 levels.
Combined use may elevate IGF-1 supraphysiologically.
Similar mechanism; risk of excessive effects at higher doses.
3.3-fold diabetes risk increase; monitor glucose closely.
May mitigate glucose intolerance associated with tesamorelin.
Blocks GH release, negates tesamorelin effects.

timeline.effects: IGF-1 levels begin to rise, possible mild water retention or joint discomfort
Visible visceral fat reduction begins, waist circumference may decrease
Peak effects achieved with significant body composition improvements

stopSigns: Development of diabetes or severe glucose intolerance (HbA1c ≥6.5%)
Excessive IGF-1 elevation (>2 SD above normal) with acromegaly symptoms
monitoring: Monitor blood glucose regularly - 3.3-fold increased diabetes risk documented
IGF-1 levels should be checked monthly - 47% exceed normal range at 26 weeks

good: FDA-approved formulations (Egrifta SV/WR from licensed pharmacy)
warning: Compounded formulations may have quality/potency variability
bad: Discolored or cloudy solution (yellow/brown indicates degradation)

references.title: Metabolic Effects of a Growth Hormone-Releasing Factor in Patients with HIV (LIPO-010)
references.keyFindings: Pivotal Phase III trial in 412 HIV patients. Tesamorelin 2mg daily for 26 weeks significantly decreased visceral fat and improved lipid profiles compared to placebo.

references.title: Effects of Tesamorelin in HIV-Infected Patients with Abdominal Fat Accumulation: Randomized Placebo-Controlled Trial with Safety Extension (CTR-1011)
references.journal: Journal of Acquired Immune Deficiency Syndromes
references.keyFindings: 404 HIV patients treated for up to 12 months. 69% achieved ≥8% VAT reduction vs 33% placebo. VAT benefits were lost upon discontinuation, confirming need for continuous therapy.

references.title: Effects of Growth Hormone-Releasing Hormone on Cognitive Function in Adults with MCI and Healthy Older Adults
references.keyFindings: 152 adults (ages 55-87) treated with tesamorelin 1mg daily for 20 weeks. Favorable effect on cognition (P=0.03), with particular benefit on executive function (P=0.005) and IGF-1 increase of 117%.

references.title: Effects of Tesamorelin on Non-Alcoholic Fatty Liver Disease in HIV: A Randomised, Double-Blind, Multicentre Trial
references.keyFindings: 61 HIV patients with NAFLD randomized to tesamorelin 2mg vs placebo for 12 months. 37% relative reduction in hepatic fat fraction (P=0.02), with prevention of fibrosis progression on liver biopsy.

references.title: Body Composition, Hepatic Fat, Metabolic, and Safety Outcomes of Tesamorelin: A Meta-Analysis of Randomized Controlled Trials
references.keyFindings: Meta-analysis of 5 RCTs showing significant VAT reduction (MD=-27.71 cm², P<0.001), increased lean body mass (MD=1.42 kg, P<0.001), and improved hepatic fat and IGF-1 levels without serious safety concerns.

latestResearch.title: Tesamorelin for Neurocognitive Impairment in HIV with Abdominal Obesity
latestResearch.summary: Phase 2 open-label trial in 73 HIV patients. Tesamorelin group showed trend toward improved neurocognition and greater waist circumference reduction (median -2.7 cm) vs standard of care, though between-group cognitive differences were not significant.

latestResearch.title: Efficacy and Safety of Tesamorelin in People with HIV on Integrase Inhibitors
latestResearch.summary: First dedicated data on tesamorelin efficacy in HIV patients on INSTI-based regimens. Tesamorelin had beneficial effects on body composition with no exacerbation of glycemic control.

quickStats.frequency: Once daily (evening preferred for GH rhythm)
quickStats.storage: Powder: 20-25°C. Egrifta SV: use immediately. Egrifta WR: room temp up to 7 days
